Good salary. Good title. Still felt behind. 👋

That's where this account starts.

I'm an engineer who got tired of trading 40+ hours a week for a paycheck that never quite caught up — so I started building on the side with AI tools.

No fake screenshots, no "get rich quick" promises. Just an engineer's honest log of what I'm building, what's working, what's flopping, and the exact tools behind it.

Follow along — new builds every week. 👇

#AIagents #SideHustle #BuildInPublic #PassiveIncome #AITools #TechCareer #FinancialFreedom #SoloFounder #ContentCreator #AIforBusiness

6 months ago I had $0 from AI. Here's what changed. 🧵

Month 1: spent my nights testing every AI tool I could find — after my full day job, with zero income to show for it.

Month 2: first small win. Used AI to write and design content for a side project — earned my first $47.

Then I connected the tools together and built my first automation. Content kept going out even when I wasn't working on it.

That's when it clicked — the real leverage isn't the AI itself, it's the system you build around it.

Now I'm documenting the exact stack here, step by step, so you can skip the months I spent figuring it out alone.

Swipe through the journey, then save this for when you're ready to start. 👉

Nobody talks about this kind of compounding. 🔄

Compound interest grows quietly for years before it's visible — most people quit before they ever see it.

Content works the exact same way.

Post #1 might get 12 views. But a year from now, it's still indexed, still searchable, still working — while post #50 gets discovered by people who never saw post #1.

Every piece of content is a permanent asset. Unlike a tweet that dies in 24 hours, a good post just keeps compounding.

I treat my content library the same way I treat my brokerage account: small deposits, don't touch it, let time do the work.

The engineers who "got lucky" with content? They just didn't quit at post #20.

What's stopping you from posting today — tell me below. 👇

#ContentStrategy #BuildInPublic #PassiveIncome #CompoundInterest #AITools #FinancialFreedom #CreatorEconomy #SideHustle #WealthMindset #SoloFounder

This account posts itself. Here's the exact stack. 🤖

No social media manager, no scheduling tool subscription. Just AI + free infrastructure:

1️⃣ Claude → writes captions, hooks, hashtags, and the carousel copy itself
2️⃣ One HTML/CSS design system → reused for every post, zero manual design
3️⃣ A browser script → renders each slide as a 1080x1080 PNG automatically
4️⃣ A free scheduler → posts to Instagram every Wednesday on autopilot

Monthly cost: $0. Manual work: picking the next topic.

Swipe for the full breakdown, then save this if you want to build your own. 👉

#AIagents #Automation #BuildInPublic #PassiveIncome #AITools #ClaudeAI #SideHustle #TechCareer #FinancialFreedom #NoCode

Your salary is one income stream. Here's how to build a second. 🔁

Stream 1: a brokerage account with dividend reinvestment turned on. Every quarter, the payouts buy more shares automatically — no decisions, no logins.

Stream 2: this account. Claude writes the captions, a script renders the carousels, a scheduler posts them. I show up once a week to pick the topic.

Different currencies — capital vs. content — but the same engineering principle: build the system once, automate the output, let compounding do the rest.

Most people treat investing and content creation as two separate hobbies fighting for their evenings. Engineers treat them as two systems running in parallel.

Which stream are you missing — capital or content? 👇

#WealthMindset #PassiveIncome #DividendInvesting #BuildInPublic #CompoundInterest #AIagents #FinancialFreedom #SideHustle #AITools #InvestingTips #TechCareer #SoloFounder

4 tasks worth automating before you scale anything else. 🔄

If you're running any kind of side hustle, these are the first things to take off your plate — all doable in n8n, free to start:

1️⃣ Content repurposing — publish once, auto-format and schedule it across every platform.
2️⃣ Lead capture → welcome — new subscriber gets tagged and onboarded instantly, no manual list work.
3️⃣ Monitoring & alerts — a scheduled check watches prices, keywords, or feeds and pings you only when something changes.
4️⃣ Reporting — pull your numbers from different tools into one weekly digest, automatically.

None of this needs a dev team. Just a free afternoon and the willingness to build the boring stuff once.

Which one would save you the most time this week? 👇

#n8n #Automation #AIagents #BuildInPublic #NoCode #SideHustle #PassiveIncome #AITools #Productivity #TechCareer #WorkSmarter #SoloFounder

Every two weeks, your paycheck hits zero. Then it does it again. 📉

That's not a flaw — that's just what an income statement does. It measures one period, then resets, no matter how good last month was.

Your balance sheet doesn't play by those rules. Assets minus liabilities — it never resets, it just compounds, quietly, while you sleep, while you scroll, while you're at work not thinking about it at all.

Here's the part that gets glossed over: two engineers can have the exact same salary and end up in completely different places. Same income statement, very different balance sheets. One spent it. The other converted it into something that compounds.

Your salary is a number someone else sets. Your net worth is the number that tells the truth about the decisions you're actually making with it.

Swipe through, then ask yourself the only question that matters — is your net worth trending up this year, or just your spending? 👉

#WealthMindset #NetWorth #CompoundInterest #FinancialFreedom #PassiveIncome #MoneyMindset #BuildInPublic #InvestingTips #PersonalFinance #FinancialLiteracy #SoloFounder #TechCareer

Your job pays you for hours. These don't. ⏱️

Stream 1 is capital — dividend ETFs that pay out on a schedule, rain or shine. It's the slowest stream to build, but once it's running it needs zero time from you. Set it, reinvest it, forget it.

Stream 2 is content — every post you publish keeps working long after you hit publish. Unlike your job, it doesn't clock out when you do. A carousel from 6 months ago can still be bringing in followers, leads, or sales today.

Stream 3 is skills — and this is the one most people skip. Package what you already know into a template, a guide, a framework. Build it once, sell it to hundreds.

Different speeds, different mechanics, same underlying pattern: capital compounds money, content compounds attention, skills compound expertise. Stack all three and you've built something your hourly rate never could — income that doesn't need you in the room.

Swipe through, then be honest with yourself about which stream you haven't started yet. 👉

#PassiveIncome #DividendInvesting #CreatorEconomy #WealthMindset #CompoundInterest #FinancialFreedom #BuildInPublic #AITools #SideHustle #InvestingTips #SoloFounder #TechCareer

ChatGPT or Claude for content? Here's the honest answer.

I use both, and they're not interchangeable.

ChatGPT wins on speed — fast first drafts, quick captions, lots of variations when I'm brainstorming.

Claude wins on follow-through — give it 5+ rules for tone and length, and it actually sticks to all of them across a long edit.

Both consumer plans are $20/mo, so the real cost is your time, not your wallet.

If you write for a living, the smart move isn't picking a side. It's knowing which tool to open for which task.

Which one do you reach for first? Drop it in the comments.

#AIagents #BuildInPublic #PassiveIncome #AITools #ClaudeAI #ChatGPT #ContentCreation #AIforWriters #TechWorkerWealth #ProductivityTools #AIWritingTools #SideHustle

"Faceless YouTube" isn't faceless.

Everyone's selling the dream of a channel that runs itself while you sleep.

Here's what's actually true in 2025: AI handles the script draft, the narration, and a good chunk of the visuals.

What it doesn't handle is the editing judgment, the thumbnail testing, and showing up every week when the numbers look flat.

I broke down exactly where AI pulls weight and where it still falls on you — swipe through.

If you've tried AI-assisted video, what part took the longest to get right?

#AIagents #BuildInPublic #PassiveIncome #AITools #YouTubeAutomation #ContentCreator #AIvoice #FaceLessYouTube #SideHustle #TechWorkerWealth #ClaudeAI #ContentStrategy

The 4% rule isn't a law of physics. It's a model — and in 2026 its assumptions are getting picked apart (early retirees with 40+ year horizons may need closer to ×28–33, not ×25).

Here's the engineer's move: when a model breaks, you don't panic. You re-solve it.

Financial independence is just an optimization problem with two inputs:

1. Your FI number = annual spending ÷ your withdrawal rate. Choose your multiple on purpose (25x classic, ~28–33x if you're retiring early).

2. Your savings rate = the one variable you actually control. You can chase raises for years (ceiling, boss, taxes), or move the lever that's 100% yours. Go from 10% → 50% savings and your timeline collapses from ~51 years to ~17. Same income. Different system.

Point your engineer brain at your own finances and "retirement" stops being a someday feeling — it becomes a date you can plan toward.

Save the table so you stop guessing, and follow @alphaengineer for the engineer's approach to building freedom with AI.

👇 Drop your savings rate and I'll give you a rough FI timeline.

#FIRE #FinancialIndependence #RetireEarly #SavingsRate #4PercentRule #FInumber #PersonalFinance #FinancialFreedom #MoneyMindset #EngineerLife #InvestSmart #FIREmovement

You don't need a dev team to build a chatbot. You need your FAQ page.

A "no-code chatbot" is really just your own knowledge wrapped around an AI model that already knows how to talk — feed it your docs, it answers in your voice, 24/7.

The build is 4 steps: pick a builder (Custom GPT, Claude Project, or a free tool like Voiceflow/Botpress), upload your source docs, write the instructions (tone, scope, when to hand off to a human), then test and embed.

It's not replacing your support inbox — it's filtering it. The same 10 questions asked 100 times a week get handled instantly, so what lands in your inbox actually needs a human.

Most people already have the tool: ChatGPT Plus and Claude Pro both include this at $20/mo, no extra setup cost.

Swipe for the full build, then save this for your next free afternoon. 👉

#AIagents #BuildInPublic #PassiveIncome #AITools #ChatGPT #ClaudeAI #NoCode #Chatbot #SideHustle #Automation #TechCareer #SoloFounder

Your thumbnail does 80% of the work before anyone watches.

For a faceless channel, there's no face to earn that click — the thumbnail has to do the convincing on its own. Midjourney is built for exactly this.

Three things your prompt needs: --ar 16:9 to match YouTube's format, a clear subject with a style reference ("dramatic studio lighting," "bold comic-book style"), and some negative space so text fits later.

The workflow: generate 4 variations, upscale the strongest one, drop it into Canva to add your title text (Midjourney rarely renders text correctly), then export at 1280x720 and check how it looks shrunk to phone size.

Three principles separate a click from a scroll-past: contrast (bright subject, dark background), emotion (a reaction pulls people in), and a curiosity gap (show the result, let the title fill the rest).

Swipe for the full breakdown, then save this for your next thumbnail. 👉
